hero.headline: Precision that heals.
hero.subtitle: Orthopedics and Traumatology with ultrasound-guided technology.

sobre.title: Dr. David Amaral
sobre.description: An orthopedist and traumatologist dedicated to restoring movement and quality of life to his patients. With solid training and continuous education, each treatment is individually planned, combining cutting-edge technology with genuine care.

servicos.title: Services
servicos.subtitle: Precise solutions for every case
servicos.cta: Find the right procedure for you

consulta.descricao: Comprehensive musculoskeletal evaluation with precise diagnosis and personalized treatment plan.

infiltracao.descricao: Minimally invasive procedure with maximum precision, allowing exact application at the pain site.

viscossuplementacao.descricao: Osteoarthritis treatment that restores joint lubrication, reducing pain and improving mobility.

artrocentese.descricao: Joint aspiration for diagnosis or relief of joint effusions, performed safely and precisely.

densitometria.descricao: Bone health assessment and osteoporosis diagnosis, essential for fracture prevention.

cirurgia.descricao: Specialized surgical treatment for ankle and limb fractures with modern fixation techniques.

tecnologia.title: Ultrasound-Guided
tecnologia.subtitle: More precision. Less pain.
tecnologia.description: Ultrasound-guided procedures offer real-time visualization, ensuring greater application precision, lower risk of complications, and faster recovery. This technology allows each injection and viscosupplementation to be performed with the exactness your treatment deserves.

precisao.descricao: Real-time visualization of the exact application point

seguranca.descricao: Lower risk of affecting adjacent structures

recuperacao.descricao: Outpatient procedure with immediate return to activities

frase.texto: Every movement matters. Every treatment is unique.

contato.title: Let Us Take Care of You
contato.subtitle: Book your appointment and take the first step toward moving pain-free again.
contato.mensagem: Hello Dr. David, I would like to book an appointment.
